purpose: Explicitly declare which parameters are allowed to be frozen cross-sector (global/structural candidates).

notes.A: Candidate global/structural geometry amplitude. Eligible for one-time anchor calibration *only if preregistered* and then frozen across sectors.
notes.alpha: Not globally coherent across the repo today. Semantics differ by sector; must be treated as sector-specific unless/until unified.

sector_specific_conventions.weak_alpha_Etilt: WEAK kernel energy-tilt modifier used inside sE(E): (xE**n) * (1 + weak_alpha_Etilt*(xE-1)).
